examples: Detective Holt said: "The kidnapper is a man we must catch and the sooner the better."
Then, still looking at me, she said slowly and seriously, "Mr Holt, do you really mean that?"
Tom, something's always told me we'd never get holt of that swag.
Rep. HOLT: There is time to do it before the general election of 2008.
Although Holt admits a few have started to raise concerns because of all the opposition.
